task: reachat still renders white ui

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Analysis:
Let me chronologically analyze the conversation:

1. User asked to implement a plan from attached files - Option F: Chat-first UI with governance feed home page
2. I created 5 tasks and launched subagents for each phase
3. Phase 1 (backend feed API) and Phase 2 (route restructure + ChatPage decomposition) ran in parallel
4. Phase 5 (inline graph in chat) ran after Phase 2
5. User asked to commit - committed as 2bb1734
6. User asked about search - route or overlay? I explained it was a route but the mockup showed an overlay
7. User said to convert search from route to overlay - I did this
8. User asked to commit - committed
9. User asked to create a PR - created PR #68
10. User said entity limit should be higher (max 10) - I updated show-relationship-graph.ts
11. User asked to commit - committed as ca36fca
12. User came back and said "the ui looks nothing like the ascii art" - pointed out missing sidebar, navigation in wrong place, padding issues
13. I restructured the layout: removed header/ViewTabs, made sidebar full-height with Projects/Agents/Chats sections, edge-to-edge layout, content area header with search trigger
14. User said "use color scheme from DESIGN_TOKENS.md" - I read the file and converted ALL hardcoded hex colors to CSS custom properties, made dark mode default
15. User said "i want to use border radius 0" - I replaced all border-radius values with 0
16. User said "reachat still renders white ui" - this is the current pending issue

The reachat library (third-party chat component) has its own styles that don't use our CSS custom properties, so it renders with white backgrounds even though our app is now dark mode.

Key files modified:
- styles.css - massive overhaul: dark mode tokens, all hex→var(), border-radius→0
- router.tsx - removed header/ViewTabs, sidebar in shell, search overlay
-
